traces.raw_content: {"sql":"SELECT g.Name AS Genre, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5","rationale":"Joins Genre to Track to InvoiceLine to calculate total revenue per genre, then orders by descending sales and limits to top 5."}
traces.sql: SELECT g.Name AS Genre, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

traces.sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, COUNT(c.CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Employee e JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC LIMIT 1

traces.raw_content: {"sql":"SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) AS AverageInvoiceTotal FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY AverageInvoiceTotal DESC","rationale":"Calculate the average invoice total per billing country by grouping on BillingCountry and ordering results descending by the computed average."}

traces.raw_content: {"sql":"SELECT c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpending, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC) AS SpendingRank FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 5","rationale":"Join Customer and Invoice to sum total spending per customer, use window function RANK to compare against others, and limit to top 5."}
traces.sql: SELECT c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpending, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC) AS SpendingRank FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 5

traces.raw_content: {"sql":"SELECT a.Name AS ArtistName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS GenreCount FROM Artist a JOIN Album al ON a.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY a.ArtistId, a.Name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3","rationale":"Join Artist to Album to Track, count distinct genres per artist, and filter for those with more than 3 genres."}
traces.sql: SELECT a.Name AS ArtistName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS GenreCount FROM Artist a JOIN Album al ON a.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY a.ArtistId, a.Name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3
